questions.question: What does [M L² T⁻²] represent?
questions.explanation: Energy (or work, or joules) = [M L² T⁻²]. This is force × distance.

questions.question: Dimensional formulas use symbols like M, L, T instead of writing out 'meter' and 'kilogram.'
questions.explanation: Yes! It's shorthand. M = mass, L = length, T = time, I = current, θ = temperature, n = amount, J = luminous intensity.
